prompt: A dramatic Chinese ink-wash fantasy portrait based on the single Chinese character {argument name="character" default="嗔"}, showing a male xianxia or wuxia warrior from the back in three-quarter profile, turning slightly to the side. He has long, windswept black hair tied in a high half-up topknot with an ornate dark metallic hair crown, with several thin red ribbons threaded through the hair and trailing in the wind. His clothing is a black embroidered robe with subtle gold patterning on the shoulder and collar, layered and heavy, with flowing fabric merging into the surrounding brushwork. The face is mostly obscured by angle and hair, creating a mysterious and intense mood. The overall composition is vertical poster art with a pale parchment background, textured with gray and black ink splashes, a large faded circular brushstroke halo behind the figure’s head, and violent red paint streaks sweeping across the lower half and right side like blood-red calligraphy in motion. Use a limited palette of black, charcoal gray, parchment beige, and deep crimson red. Add 2 calligraphic text areas: a vertical poem column in black Chinese calligraphy on the upper left with a small red seal stamp beneath it, and a very large bold red Chinese character {argument name="large title character" default="嗔"} painted at the lower left. Beside the large red character, place a vertical Romanized label reading {argument name="romanization" default="CHEN"}. The style should feel like expressive ink painting mixed with ultra-detailed cinematic character illustration, with flying hair strands, splattered brush textures, emotional tension, and a dark, wrathful, elegant atmosphere.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具戏剧性的中国水墨风奇幻肖像，以单个汉字 {argument name="character" default="嗔"} 为核心。画面展示了一位仙侠或武侠男性角色的背影，呈四分之三侧面，正微微回首。他留着随风飘逸的长发，束成高半马尾，戴着精致的深色金属发冠，几条细长的红丝带穿插在发间，随风飘动。身着黑色刺绣长袍，肩部和领口饰有精致的金色纹样，衣着层叠厚重，流动的布料与周围的笔触融为一体。由于角度和发丝的遮挡，面部大部分隐没在阴影中，营造出神秘而强烈的氛围。整体构图为竖版海报，背景为浅色羊皮纸质感，带有灰色和黑色的墨迹飞溅，人物头部后方有一个巨大的淡化圆形笔触光环，下半部分和右侧有狂野的红色笔触横扫而过，如同动态的血色书法。配色方案限定为黑色、炭灰色、羊皮纸米色和深绯红色。添加 2 处书法文本区域：左上角为黑色汉字书法竖排诗句，下方配有一个红色小印章；左下角绘制一个巨大的粗体红色汉字 {argument name="large title character" default="嗔"}。在大号红色汉字旁，放置一个竖排的罗马拼音标签 {argument name="romanization" default="CHEN"}。整体风格融合了表现力十足的水墨画与超精细的电影级角色插画，呈现出飞扬的发丝、飞溅的笔触纹理、强烈的情绪张力以及黑暗、愤怒且优雅的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 中国水墨风“嗔”字角色海报：此提示词可生成一张充满意境的竖版仙侠风水墨海报，以单个汉字为核心，适用于极具表现力的字体艺术或戏剧性的奇幻封面设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
